tools.name: evaluate_wearable_stream
tools.description: Stateless edge middleware to optimize visual-to-acoustic metadata layouts, process kinematics, and monitor user-calibrated orientation ergonomics.

user_id.description: Anonymized unique hardware identifier for the consumer eyewear node.

input_string.description: Raw unstructured document layout, text block, or microphone voice annotation transcript.

agent_mode.description: The specific sub-agent middleware configuration chosen to process the stream frames.

pitch.description: Geometric head-tilt angle tracking metric along the horizontal X-axis.

yaw.description: Geometric panning rotation tracking metric along the vertical Y-axis.

roll.description: Lateral tilt offset relative to the local horizon coordinates.

posture_hold_duration.description: Continuous duration counter in seconds spent at the current orientation coordinates.

ambient_light_intensity.description: Percentage value tracking the lux measurement from the forward optical sensor.

contrast_adaptation_mode.description: The active filter layout layer mapped over the user glass lenses.
